meaning: n.[宗]口授经文教理,用问答方式演讲
examples: Catechesis is intimately bound up with the whole of the Church's life.
The program is simple: a meeting and celebration space for at least 400 people, classrooms for catechesis, meeting rooms for the parish and a home for the pastor.
The Magisterium of the Pastors of the Church in moral matters is ordinarily exercised in catechesis and preaching, with the help of the works of theologians and spiritual authors.
